full_text:
Sun Li (Deda) 孫禮 (德達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Li (孫禮), styledDeda (德達). Fought against Shu under Sima Yi and Cao Zhen. Became an Excellency. Sun Li was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Sun Li lived during the Three Kingdoms periods of Chinese history.
